files.description: Product constitution — non-negotiable. Style over accuracy. Brilliant % headline. Engine as mirror not judge.
Master spec — phase scope, what is built vs planned. Do not suggest out-of-phase features.
Accepted ADR — Brilliant tier and headline metric are locked unless new ADR.
Human and AI reviewer guide — what to flag vs push back on.
Local-first monorepo architecture — web, api, supabase, Stockfish server-side.
CI gates and philosophy contracts — automated invariants Greptile should not contradict.
Contribution workflow, conventions, what to preserve.
Database schema — RLS, brilliant tier, style_vectors, reference tables.
Tal-style brilliant heuristics — intentional approximations, not bugs.
Move quality tiers including brilliant and miss — rule-based Phase 1.
